title: Bound To
text: Bound To This property defines the name of the generic entity or field in a modeled component to which the current object is bound. Technical Name: BOUND_TEMPLATE Expected Value: String of up to 32 characters. Supports Unicode. Default Value: None Description This property is only applicable if the object's Is Bound property is True , which is only possible in a derived component. For more information, see Modeled Components and Generic and Bound Entities and Fields . Applies To Component Entity Component Field Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
